rows.title: Shell wedge inspector overlay
rows.target_workflow: local proof and diagnostics overlay inspection
rows.visible_marker_disclosure: Labs surface. Cohort maintainer_and_contributor_local • opt-in until 2026-06-30.

kill_switch_path.fallback_path: Inspect source fixtures and diagnostics records without opening the overlay.
kill_switch_path.summary: Stops resolve through emergency → admin policy → release-channel → cohort/ring → user toggle for shell.labs.wedge_inspector_overlay.

host_surfaces.disclosure: Non-stable row · the settings root renders the lifecycle chip inline so the surface never claims stable behind a hidden experiment.
Labs tab opt-in surface; the tab itself is the visible marker.
Help / About cards quote the lifecycle chip for any non-stable capability used by the build.
Diagnostics panel renders every inventory row with its lifecycle and kill-switch context.
Support-export packet quotes the same lifecycle and kill-switch fields as the UI row.
